response.overview: Duwata Mawaka Misa is a 1997 Sri Lankan film directed by Sumitra Peries. The film stars Sangeetha Weerarathne, Ranjan Ramanayake, Sanath Gunathilake, Vasanthi Chathurani, Tony Ranasinghe, Sriyani Amarasena, W. Jayasiri, Yashoda Wimaladharma. Released on 14 February. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Duwata Mawaka Misa
